steps.title: Set up the area equation
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is length times width: $$x(x-15)=76$$.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice B
steps.content: Backsolving — testing choice B (19): compute 19 * (19-15) = 19 * 4 = 76, which equals the given area. That matches choice B — B is correct.
